elder.name: Village Elder
lines: Beware the forests to the north — monsters lurk there.
May the light guide your path.

merchant.name: Road Merchant
lines: Fresh wares for the long road ahead!
I patrol this route so the village never runs short on supplies.

scout.name: Town Scout
lines: I make random rounds through town to keep watch.
If you find a chest in the woods, check it carefully before nightfall.

town_sign.name: Town Sign
lines: Travelers welcome. Keep the northern road clear.
